no: Diablo 2 Paladin kit for Paladin class. Offensive/defensive auras and combat skills. Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

activated.effects: Prayer, Defiance, Cleansing, Meditation, Redemption, Salvation.
Might, Holy Fire/Freeze/Shock, Thorns, Fanaticism, Conviction.
Sacrifice, Smite, Holy Bolt, Zeal, Charge, Vengeance, Blessed Hammer, Holy Shield, Fist of the Heavens.

restrictions.items: Loses standard Paladin spellcasting. Max 1 pip in two-handed weapons. No dual-class.

spellRestrictions.note: D2 skill tree replaces standard Paladin spellcasting

hlaPool.note: D2 paladin aura system replaces standard paladin HLAs.

statBonus.note: D2 skill trees: Defensive/Offensive Auras + Combat Skills.

new: Diablo 2-inspired holy warrior. Auras, combat skills, and divine offensive abilities.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Paladin kit for the Paladin class. Offensive and defensive auras plus combat skills.

co.n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Holy Shield
co.tp2n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Holy Shield
